title: actinophloeus kerstenianus
intro: Actinophloeus kerstenianus, also known as the yellow wood tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Actinophloeus kerstenianus include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Actinophloeus kerstenianus typically involve extracting its bark or leaves to create teas, infusions, or other medicinal products.
